fileNodes.name: manual_court_selector.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides a manual court selector GUI using OpenCV to define and register the 12 key points of a pickleball court.

fileNodes.name: main.py
fileNodes.summary: The main orchestrator and execution entry point of the pickleball tracking and telemetry video processing pipeline.

fileNodes.name: ball_tracker.py
fileNodes.summary: Implements the ball tracking system using a YOLO v8/v5 model and Pandas-based interpolation to estimate missing frames.

fileNodes.name: auto_player_filter.py
fileNodes.summary: Performs automatic player isolation, spectator purging, and Re-ID mapping using L2-normalized templates and quadrant sorting.

fileNodes.name: ball_physics_analyzer.py
fileNodes.summary: Analyzes ball trajectory, velocity, and acceleration to detect physics events (bounces and paddle hits) with temporal cooldown constraints.

fileNodes.name: app.py
fileNodes.summary: Main Streamlit application that renders the InBound Vision dashboard with match performance statistics, player scorecards, rally logs, and interactive 2D court telemetry plots.

fileNodes.name: mini_court.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the MiniCourt class, which uses homography transformation to project 2D camera coordinates onto a top-down, real-world representation of a Pickleball court.

fileNodes.name: officiating_engine.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides the OfficiatingEngine class, which detects when a ball bounce is IN or OUT and overlays a broadcast-style banner with the call onto the video frame.

fileNodes.name: stats_telemetry_tracker.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides the StatsTelemetryTracker class, which records and computes locomotion telemetry (speed, distance) and proximity-based hit attribution for individual players, and draws a HUD overlay.

fileNodes.name: METHODS_AND_RETROSPECTIVE.md
fileNodes.summary: Detailed documentation of the pbtracker technology stack, key geometric and kinematic methods, and a retrospective analysis of failed and successful tracking attempts.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Main project documentation detailing the pickleball tracking pipeline, directory structure, quick start installation, post-processing tools, and cached data formats.

fileNodes.name: graphify.html
fileNodes.summary: Interactive HTML dashboard displaying a Canvas-based force-directed architecture graph of the pbtracker modules, dependencies, and data flow relationships.

fileNodes.name: pyproject.toml
fileNodes.summary: Python project configuration file defining dependencies such as boxmot, lapx, opencv-python, streamlit, and ultralytics for the pbtracker project.

fileNodes.name: .python-version
fileNodes.summary: Specifies the target Python version (3.12) required for the project environment.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Excludes temporary cache, locks, data files, and video assets from project-wide analysis.

fileNodes.name: config.json
fileNodes.summary: Configures localization settings for the understanding-anything plugin, setting output language to English.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Initialization script for the court line detection package.

fileNodes.name: analyze_filtration.py
fileNodes.summary: Analyzes raw player tracking stubs and court boundaries to evaluate spatial filtration and kinetic movement threshold filters.

fileNodes.name: analyze_std.py
fileNodes.summary: Computes spatial coordinate standard deviation and range to determine track dispersion and movement patterns.

fileNodes.name: analyze_stubs.py
fileNodes.summary: Calculates and prints statistics (such as lifespans, coordinate ranges, and on-court metrics) from player detections pickle stubs.

fileNodes.name: annotate_frames_debug.py
fileNodes.summary: Annotates specific frames of the input video with court keypoints and player bounding boxes to verify detection accuracy.

fileNodes.name: botsort_custom.yaml
fileNodes.summary: Custom tracker parameters configuration specifying threshold limits and buffers for BoT-SORT.

fileNodes.name: check_malaysia.py
fileNodes.summary: Checks and displays the total number of frames in the Malaysia video file.

fileNodes.name: check_video_frames.py
fileNodes.summary: Retrieves and prints total frames, dimensions, and frame rate for various input video files.

fileNodes.name: extract_all_raw_crops.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts and saves image crops for player track IDs with a lifespan exceeding 100 frames to inspect detection consistency.

fileNodes.name: extract_final_frames.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts specific frames from the final annotated tracking video for visual verification.

fileNodes.name: extract_fine_tuned_frames.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts selected frames from tracking output videos to check physics-based trajectory and bounding box overlays.

fileNodes.name: extract_malaysia_frames.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts designated verification frames from annotated Malaysia match video outputs.

fileNodes.name: extract_newvideo_frames.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts specific frame indices from annotated newvideo output files to check tracking consistency.

fileNodes.name: extract_player_crops.py
fileNodes.summary: Extracts the first occurrence crop of player IDs 1, 2, 3, and 4 from the newclip video for verification.

fileNodes.name: generate_raw_tracks.py
fileNodes.summary: Processes the input video to perform player tracking using PlayerTracker and saves raw, unfiltered detections to a pickle stub.

fileNodes.name: inspect_malaysia_players.py
fileNodes.summary: Inspects player tracking detections for the Malaysia match, displaying presence and bounding box statistics for each player ID.

fileNodes.name: prepare_newvideo_stubs.py
fileNodes.summary: Copies active court, player, and ball detection stubs to newvideo-specific stub names for testing.

fileNodes.name: rename_stubs.py
fileNodes.summary: Renames newvideo-specific tracking stubs to Malaysia tracking stubs to prep test data.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Initialization file for the trackers package.

fileNodes.name: player_tracker.py
fileNodes.summary: Core player tracker module implementing YOLO object detection and BoxMOT tracker updates with OSNet ReID embedding extraction.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Initialization file for the utilities package.

fileNodes.name: check_ids.py
fileNodes.summary: Analyzes the player detection tracking stub file to generate and print a usage summary sorted by frame presence.

fileNodes.name: generate_id_debug_frame.py
fileNodes.summary: Generates a single annotated diagnostic image from a source video highlighting detected players and their associated tracking IDs.

fileNodes.name: tracklet_merger.py
fileNodes.summary: Post-processing script to heal broken or fragmented tracklets by correlating them using temporal, spatial, and HSV color similarity.

fileNodes.name: deep_reid_healer.py
fileNodes.summary: Post-processing track stitcher that leverages a headless ResNet50 model to extract deep visual embeddings from player crops and stitches fragmented tracklets via cosine similarity.
